completed_campaigns.name: family-smoke
completed_campaigns.reproduction_command: PYTHONPATH=src python -m eml_symbolic_regression.cli campaign family-smoke --output-root artifacts/campaigns --label v1.8-family-smoke-triage --overwrite

completed_campaigns.name: family-calibration
completed_campaigns.reproduction_command: PYTHONPATH=src python -m eml_symbolic_regression.cli campaign family-calibration --output-root artifacts/campaigns --label v1.8-family-calibration --overwrite

completed_campaigns.name: family-standard
completed_campaigns.reproduction_command: PYTHONPATH=src python -m eml_symbolic_regression.cli campaign family-standard --output-root artifacts/campaigns --label v1.8-family-standard-scoped --overwrite --formula exp --formula log --formula beer_lambert --seed 0

scoped_campaigns.name: family-shallow-pure-blind
scoped_campaigns.scope_reason: scoped after calibration because centered exp/log blind variants recovered 0/20 and full pure-blind matrix would mainly expand known centered failures

scoped_campaigns.name: family-shallow
scoped_campaigns.scope_reason: scoped until same-family centered scaffold/witness support exists; centered warm-start rows remain fail-closed in denominators

scoped_campaigns.name: family-basin
scoped_campaigns.scope_reason: centered perturbed-tree paths require same-family exact target seeds and remain explicit unsupported gates

scoped_campaigns.name: family-depth-curve
scoped_campaigns.scope_reason: scoped because centered shallow calibration showed no positive signal; defer larger depth sweep until centered shallow behavior improves

scoped_campaigns.name: family-showcase
scoped_campaigns.scope_reason: skipped because earlier evidence showed no meaningful centered-family positive signal
